data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. SCOTT QUIBBLE has an honest record despite remaining a maiden and overdue for a win, having placed three of nine career runs. Can discover winning form. 7. SCOTT ELYSIAN stalked the lead and fought on well to finish 4 lengths away in second (22.58) at Shepparton in a Maiden over 390m. Expected to feature. 8. TRENTON'S ACE drew an outside box and was game in defeat when only a neck from the winner Paris Mash in second(22.82) at this track. Must be included in calculations. 2. MOONS AT NIGHT can fill a top-three spot.","runners":[1,7,8,2],"exclusive":false}
